definition:
ἔχθρα, -ας, ἡ
 (ἐχθρός), [in LXX for אֵיבָה, שִׂנְאָה, etc. ;] 
enmity: Luk.23:12, Rom.8:7, Gal.5:20, Eph.2:15-16, Jas.4:4.†
 ἀηδία, -ας, ἡ 
 (ἀ- neg., ἦδος, pleasure), [in LXX: Pro.23:29 (שִׂיחַ)* ;] 
  1. of things or persons, unpleasantness, odiousness (Hipp., Dem., al.) 
   2. dislike (Plat.). disagreement (MM, VGT, see word): Luk.23:12 D.†
 (AS)
